changelog:
Backend: multi API keys with per-key daily limits.

- New config.APIKey struct: id, key (sk-kg-... secret), name, enabled, models whitelist, dailyReqLimit / dailyTokLimit / dailyCredLimit (0 = unlimited), expiresAt, plus daily counters that reset at UTC midnight and lifetime totals.
- validateApiKey now accepts (in order): the legacy single config.ApiKey for backward compat, OR any enabled non-expired key in config.APIKeys. Constant-time compare.
- Admin REST endpoints: GET /admin/api/apikeys, POST /admin/api/apikeys (create), PUT /admin/api/apikeys/{id} (patch name/enabled/models/limits/expiry), DELETE /admin/api/apikeys/{id}.
- Per-request debit: when a request authenticates against a multi-key, the success path calls config.ConsumeAPIKey to increment that key's daily and lifetime counters. Daily counters reset at UTC midnight.
- Daily limits enforced before write: if adding the new tokens / credits would exceed the configured limit, the consume call rejects (overcount during the actual proxy turn is bounded by the request itself).
- Dashboard UI for keys is NOT yet wired in this version (A8); keys can be created/listed/revoked via the admin REST API today using the existing X-Admin-Password header.

A6: security hardening (constant-time auth, refuse default password, http.Server timeouts, graceful shutdown, atomic config save, 5min refresh + per-account lazy refresh, Dockerfile USER 1000:1000 + alpine:3.19 + HEALTHCHECK + tini).
A5: drop Claude Code system prompt entirely when detected.
A4: remove ThinkingModePrompt; split filter chain.
A3: drop --- SYSTEM PROMPT --- markers; structured tool results only.
A2: kiro-go-patch container_name + pull_policy: always.
A1: <system-reminder>/x-anthropic-billing-header strip; /v1/responses endpoint; model id echo.
